title: National Accounts Statistics — GDP and GVA aggregates

warnings: National GDP/GVA data is declared as a target dataset but not yet ingested.
Planned sources: MoSPI National Accounts page and eSankhyiki NAS API.
This artifact serves as the comparison anchor for State SDP share-of-India normalization.

indicators.source_dataset_code: GDP at market prices (current prices), 2011-2012 series
indicators.name: Gross Domestic Product
indicators.description: Aggregate GDP at market prices for India.
indicators.release_policy: MoSPI National Accounts; latest revision only.

indicators.source_dataset_code: GDP at market prices (constant prices), 2011-2012 series
indicators.name: Gross Domestic Product
indicators.description: Aggregate GDP at constant prices for India.
indicators.release_policy: MoSPI National Accounts; latest revision only.

indicators.source_dataset_code: GVA at basic prices (current prices), 2011-2012 series
indicators.name: Gross Value Added
indicators.description: Aggregate GVA at basic prices for India.
indicators.release_policy: MoSPI National Accounts; latest revision only.

indicators.source_dataset_code: GVA at basic prices (constant prices), 2011-2012 series
indicators.name: Gross Value Added
indicators.description: Aggregate GVA at constant prices for India.
indicators.release_policy: MoSPI National Accounts; latest revision only.

coverage.note: declared not ingested — no observations emitted

warnings: This dataset is a placeholder for national-level GDP/GVA comparison series.
When populated, it will serve as the denominator for State SDP share-of-India calculations.
Planned ingestion: MoSPI National Accounts workbook or eSankhyiki NAS API.
